title: Lazer Guns mod
description: This mod add to game a Lazer Gun!
body:
!report bugs IN DISCORD!   Welcome to a new era of crafting and combat! This mod significantly expands your Minecraft experience by introducing a collection of unique, high-tier materials and advanced weaponry.

Key Features:
New Resource Materials: Discover rare ores and craft them into solid blocks.

Powerful Tools: Use the new materials to craft durable tools that surpass standard vanilla gear.

3 Unique Laser Guns: Take down enemies from a distance! These high-tech weapons feature a special firing mechanism—simply use Right-Click (RMB) to unleash a powerful laser beam.
Decorative Blocks: Use the new material blocks to give your base a futuristic or industrial look.

Whether you are a builder looking for new textures or a fighter needing more firepower, this mod has something for you. Enhance your world today!

is my first mod
